description: You are a bioinformatics student at an OLPC-equipped school. Using the Sugar Terminal, write and execute a Python 3 script at /home/ga/Documents/dna_analyzer.py to analyze the human insulin gene sequence located at /home/ga/Documents/insulin.fasta. The script must parse the DNA sequence by ignoring the FASTA header line and merging remaining lines, then calculate the total sequence length, count the occurrences of each nucleotide (A, C, G, T), calculate the GC content percentage, and transcribe the DNA to mRNA. Generate a report at /home/ga/Documents/insulin_report.txt containing the calculated numeric values and the transcribed mRNA sequence string.
